title: Sanguis
description: Sanguis turpis et dentes cruenti - A vampire mod for Minecraft, perfect for Halloween
body:
_

- Sanguis turpis et dentes cruenti -

_ _

- Vile blood and blood-stained teeth -

_ Sanguis adds Vampires to the game, either for you to hunt them down or join them. This mod is heavily inspired by [Vampirism](https://modrinth.com/mod/vampirism), and takes many concepts from it, though it still represents my own take on a vampire mod. This mod is still in development, and will be improved and added to in the future. If you find any bugs, please report them on Github. ## Guide The mod includes an in-game guide book called "Daemonologie", crafted with a Bloody Fang (dropped by Vampire entities) or Garlic and a Book.
